case_title: ROYCE YU VS. STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY ET AL

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE FOR SERVICE:$150.00) (PROOF FORWARDED TO DEPT 506 TO BE PLACED IN DOCKET) SERVED SEP-04-2024, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT STATE FARM GENERAL INSURANCE COMPANY
ORDER ON REQUEST TO POSTPONE THE SMALL CLAIMS HEARING. THE REQUEST IS GRANTED.
